lectures.title: GMAT×欧洲工商管理学宣讲会，与INSEAD招生副总监面对面！
lectures.description: 关于INSEAD 欧洲工商管理学院(The Business School for the World)，1957 年创立，是全球极具影响力的国际化研究生商学院，在法国枫丹白露、新加坡、阿布扎比设校区，旧金山设商业创新中心。2025 年《金融时报》排名中，位列欧洲商学院第 1、全球全日制 MBA 第 2、全球管理学硕士第 3，拥有覆盖 178 个国家的 7 万余名校友网络，培养的世界 500 强 CEO 数量位居全球前列。 Founded in 1957, INSEAD (The Business School for the World) is a leading global graduate business school with campuses in France, Singapore, Abu Dhabi, and a San Francisco innovation center. Ranked #1 in Europe, #2 in Global Full-Time MBA, and #3 in Global MiM by the 2025 Financial Times, it has a 70,000+ alumni network across 178 countries and is a top producer of Fortune 500 CEOs. GMAC Graduate Management Admission Council，1953 年由哈佛、沃顿等知名商学院发起的非营利机构，是 GMAT 考试的主办方。GMAT 考试为全球 7000 多个商科研究生项目认可，是商科留学的核心入学评估方式，GMAC 同时还为商科申请者提供备考资源、行业数据与择校指导等全方面支持。 GMAC (Graduate Management Admission

lectures.title: 迈特擎宇机器人CMO分享会，实习+全职热招中，现场揭秘：科研/实习如何成为规划“加分项”
lectures.description: 科研启航 · 实习破局 Research Launch · Internship Breakthrough 卡梅学长来了！从WalmartLabs到AI创业，从大数据架构到市场合伙人——苏铭彻学长带着他的独家经验回到校园。 A CMU alumnus is coming to campus! From WalmartLabs to AI entrepreneurship, from big data architecture to marketing leadership — Su Mingche is here to share his journey and insights. 和你聊聊： 如何找第一份科研和企业实习？ How to Find Your First Research Opportunity & Corporate Internship? 1. 实习和学术科研对于升学的价值点 The Value of Internship & Academic Research for Further Study 2. 学术科研基本概念和如何准备规划 Core Concepts of Academic Research & How to Prepare and Plan 3. 如何结合自身专业选择合适的实习 How to Choose the Right Internship Based on Your Major Guest Speaker： Su Mingche CMO, Shanghai Maite Qingyu Robotics Technology Co., Ltd. Partner, Shanghai Bintong Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. He holds a Master's degree from Carnegi

lectures.title: GRE Practice Test | GRE 模考
lectures.description: GRE Official Practice Test Capacity：25 students open to all UNNC students (first come, first served. but Please ensure that you can participate, and then register so as not to occupy someone else's spot.) 先到先得，每位同学一次机会 名额有限，请确认后再报名！ 报名缺考者将取消以后的模考资格！ 如果确定不能参加， 请在3月30日9点之前取消报名 本次模考采用ETS官方备考材料POWERPREP PLUS® Online，会模拟实际的GRE机考真题，考后会有三科的模考分数和答案详解，帮助你备考GRE普通考试。就业办会提供模考code。 要求之前未参加过就业办提供的GRE模考，因为每人仅限一次机会。 就业办 将于3月30日给参与考试的同学们发送邮件到宁诺邮箱，请按时查看邮件，认真阅读，提前完成网站注册等。 请充分准备 GRE 考试，在机房认真完成所有的考试（包括写作部分的模拟）。考试时长约2个小时，我们希望每位参与的同学可以充分地利用好模考。 当你结束模考，你需要完成反馈表（填写模考分数）。你的个人信息和分数将保密，仅用于完成记录和主办方奖品发放。 请提前达到考场登录领取模考券，必须在 2点15分前到！以免影响其他同学考试的进行。 Pls read carefully about below Attendance Rule: This practice exam will use the Powerprep PLUS practice test, which simulates the actual GRE® General Test, and you will be give

lectures.title: Career Preparation Week · 春招季
lectures.description: Career Preparation Week · 春招季 4.7–4.9 | Get Prepared for Your Moment to Shine (报名请下滑至 报名方 式 扫码 进行活动预约) 4月7日–4月9日 ， Career Preparation Week · 春招季 重磅来袭！ 三天时间，从简历、面试到职业形象，一站式帮你搞定求职关键环节。 From April 7 to April 9, Career Preparation Week · Spring Recruitment Season is here to help you master every step of your job search—from CV and interviews to professional image—all in just three days. Get Prepared for Your Moment to Shine. Event Schedule Data Time Event Content Location April 7, Thuesday 11:00-16:30 春招启动日 · 摆摊咨询 活动预热、现场预约 Kick-off Day · Info Booth Event preview, on-site registration 诺丁桥头 Bridge Area April 8, Wednesday 13:30–20:00 简历修改 + 模拟面试 1对1简历诊断 · 模拟面试实战演练 · 即时反馈 Resume Editing + Mock Interview One-on-one CV review, mock interview with real-time feedback DB Lobby April 9, Thursday 9:00–2

lectures.title: Career Skill Workshop: Discover Your Strengths DNA & Unlock Your Unique Edge
lectures.description: 8 Apr | Discover Your Strengths DNA & Unlock Your Unique Edge Core Challenge: "I don't know what I'm really good at." "My major seems common—what makes me different?" Workshop Highlights: Strengths      DNA Discovery: Explore 34 talent themes and identify your TOP 3 core      strengths Real-World      Cases: Career path analysis of Marketing Managers & HR Specialists –      see how strengths drive success Career      Sweet Spot Model: Interest × Ability × Value = Your ideal career direction Action      Plan: Build your unique competitive edge Time: 8 Apr (Wed) Venue: PB216 Sessions: Session      1: 1:30–3:00 PM Target Audience: Open to students exploring their career direction and self-awareness

lectures.title: GMAT Practice test | GMAT 模考
lectures.description: GMAT 模考 GMAT Practice Test Capacity：15 students open to all UNNC students (first come, first served. but Please ensure that you can participate, and then register so as not to occupy someone else's spot.) 名额有限，请确认后再报名！ 每位同学一次模考机会，如果确定不能参加，请在4月6日日之前邮件取消报名！ 模考采用 GMAT 官方模考题 6 ，模拟真实考试体验，备战 GMAT 考试。宁诺就业指导办公室将提供模考code。 就业办 将于4 月 6 日给参与考试的同学发送邮件，请按时查看邮件，认真阅读，提前完成网站注册等。 请充分准备 GMAT 考试，在机房认真完成所有的考试（包括写作部分的模拟）。考试时长约2个小时15分钟，我们希望每位参与的同学可充分地利用好模考。 当你结束模考，你需要完成反馈表（填写模考分数）。你的个人信息和分数将保密，仅用于主办方奖品发放。 请提前达到考场登录领取模考券，必须在 2 点 15 分前到！以免影响其他同学考试的进行。 We will provide GMAT Official Practice Exams - Focus Edition 6,  full-length GMAT™ practice exams to simulate the test-taking experience and develop your test-taking strategy before exam day. lectures.title: Boston University Info-session 波士顿大学宣讲会
lectures.description: Boston University 波士顿大学 1) 文理学院（CAS）经济学系 College of Arts & Sciences (CAS)– Department of Economics, Graduate Programs 2) 大都会学院（MET） Metropolitan College (MET) – Graduate Programs 波士顿大学简介 波士顿大学是全美第5大私立大学，U.S. News全美Top 50。坐落于波士顿——美国#1国际学生友好城市，拥有来自150个国家的学生，下设16个学院。 CAS 经济学系：全美经济学系 Top 15 （ RePeC 排名），提供 4 个 STEM 认证硕士项目，该系有 4 名教授位列全球前 1% ， 14 名位列前 5% ，约一半的教授位列全球前 10% 。 MET 大都会学院： BU 最大的研究生学院，提供 20+ 职业导向硕士项目，涵盖计算机、商科等方向， 8 个 STEM 认证项目。 CAS – Economics: MS Quantitative Economics, MS Applied Economics & Data Science, MS Economic Policy & Practice, MA Global Development Economics MET – Computer Science & Technology: MS Computer Science, MS Computer Information Systems, MS Applied Data Analytics, MS Software Development, MS Health Informatics MET – Business & Management: MS Financial Management, M

lectures.description: The Ultimate Intern’s Survival Guide For: Students about to start an internship, those nervous about the workplace, anyone who wants to hit the ground running—or those who have finished an internship but feel they gained little.
